subject: Evergreen Retail CSV import missing candidate phone numbers
summary: Evergreen Retail imported seasonal candidates but phone numbers were blank for many rows.
cause: The CSV header Phone Number did not match the saved phone_mobile mapping and was skipped in preview.
resolution: Data Import Operations updated the mapping, reran the import preview, and imported corrected rows.

subject: Quartz Education CSV import skipped candidate email values
summary: Quartz Education reported csv import skipped candidate email values during a recruiting workflow.
cause: CSV header did not match the saved mapping
resolution: Corrected field mapping and reran import preview

subject: Riverstone Insurance Candidate import missing phone numbers
summary: Riverstone Insurance reported candidate import missing phone numbers during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Phone column used unsupported locale formatting
resolution: Normalized phone values and imported affected rows

subject: Summit Apparel Duplicate rule merged distinct applicants
summary: Summit Apparel reported duplicate rule merged distinct applicants during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Dedupe rule used name-only matching
resolution: Changed dedupe mode to email plus requisition

subject: TerraGrid Resume URL column ignored during import
summary: TerraGrid reported resume url column ignored during import during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Resume URL column was mapped as a note field
resolution: Mapped resume URL to attachment and replayed import
